programme.title: Best Men, (1999, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Drew Barrymore, Luke Wilson and Sean Patrick Flannery star in this hilarious action-comedy wherein Drew Barrymore is a young woman determined to have the perfect wedding day, despite the fact that the groomsmen have decided to rob the local bank.

programme.title: The Way Of The Gun, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: A pair of bumbling criminals kidnap a woman for ransom money, but they soon realize they've made a huge mistake when they learn she is a surrogate for a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: At Close Range, (1986, Thriller)
programme.desc: A son wants to be like his father and earn himself a place in the family crime syndicate. Together with his brother, he forms his own gang to gain his dad's respect. Efforts backfire as the father fears that he is losing control.

programme.title: King of New York, (1990, Thriller)
programme.desc: Recently freed from prison, Frank White (Christopher Walken) begins to exterminate the drug lords who rose to power in his absence. When a group of enraged cops declares war on him, Frank's answer is to put a contract out on the cops.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction, (1994, Thriller)
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: Suicide Kings, (1998, Thriller)
programme.desc: A group of youngsters kidnap a respected Mafia figure.

programme.title: Nick of Time, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: Gene arrives home after attending his ex-wife's funeral. Soon, his daughter is kidnapped. He is given a gun and told that if he hasn't killed that person in one hour and fifteen minutes, his daughter will be killed.

programme.title: Things To Do In Denver When You're Dead, (1995, Thriller)
programme.desc: An ex-gangster (Andy Garcia) reassembles his old gang for one last job. When things go awry and someone gets killed, Jimmy and his partners are marked for death, leaving Jimmy 48 hours to make things right for his buddies and the woman of his dreams.

programme.title: Explorers, (1985, Family Sci-Fi & Fantasy)
programme.desc: In their makeshift laboratory, three boys use an amazing discovery and their ingenuity to build their own spaceship and launch themselves on a fantastic interplanetary journey.

programme.title: The Monster Squad, (1987, Horror)
programme.desc: Young kids form a club that is devoted to monsters, but soon get more than they bargained for when Dracula adjourns to Earth, with Frankenstein's Monster, Wolfman, Mummy, and the Gillman.

programme.title: Teen Witch, (1989, Comedy)
programme.desc: One week before her sixteenth birthday, a girl realizes that she is the descendant from one of the witches of Salem. She uses her newfound powers to snag herself the football-hero as her boyfriend and to become the most popular girl in school.

programme.title: Teen Wolf, (1985, Thriller)
programme.desc: A teenage boy's incredible werewolf powers improve the quality of his life in dramatic and hilarious ways.

programme.title: Teen Wolf Too, (1987, Comedy)
programme.desc: The further comedic adventuress of a teenage werewolf as Todd Howard's younger werewolf cousin goes to college on a sports scholarship.

programme.title: Brotherhood of the Wolf, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: In 18th-century France, the Chevalier de Fronsac and his Native American friend Mani are sent to the Gevaudan province at the king's behest to investigate the killings of hundreds by a mysterious beast.

programme.title: The Gangster, The Cop, The Devil, (2019, Action)
programme.desc: After barely surviving a violent attack by an elusive serial killer, crime boss Jang Dong-su finds himself forming an unlikely partnership with local detective Jung Tae-seok to catch the sadistic killer known as K.

programme.title: Minari, (2021, Drama)
programme.desc: A tender and sweeping story about what roots us, Minari follows a Korean-American family that moves to an Arkansas farm in search of their own American Dream.

programme.title: Wayne's World 2, (1993, Comedy)
programme.desc: Having achieved godlike status as a late-night TV personality, Wayne now confronts the question that has plagued man for centuries: Is there life after cable?

programme.title: Kingpin, (1996, Comedy)
programme.desc: A star bowler whose career was prematurely "cut off" hopes to ride a new prodigy to success and riches.

programme.title: Wayne's World, (1992, Comedy)
programme.desc: When a sleazy TV exec offers Wayne and Garth a contract to tape their late-night cable-access show at his network, they discover the road to the big time is full of gnarly twists and turns.

programme.title: Wayne's World 2, (1993, Comedy)
programme.desc: Having achieved godlike status as a late-night TV personality, Wayne now confronts the question that has plagued man for centuries: Is there life after cable?

programme.title: Kingpin, (1996, Comedy)
programme.desc: A star bowler whose career was prematurely "cut off" hopes to ride a new prodigy to success and riches.

programme.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral, (1994, Romance)
programme.desc: A reserved Englishman meets attractive American Carrie at a wedding and falls in love with her, but his inability to express his feelings seems to forestall any possibility of relationship - until they meet again and again.

programme.title: Swingers, (1996, Screwball)
programme.desc: In this laugh-out-loud indie comedy classic that launched the careers of its outstanding cast, two friends set out to rewrite modern dating from Los Angeles to Las Vegas.

programme.title: Clerks, (1994, Comedy)
programme.desc: The legendary indie film that launched the career of Kevin Smith and won over audiences with its raw energy, outrageous comedy, and a hip soundtrack. CLERKS features razor-sharp wit and the debut of pop-culture icons Jay and Silent Bob.

programme.title: Chasing Amy, (1997, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Cult comic-book artist Holden falls head-over-heels with fellow artist Alyssa, but, for that love to live, he'll need to contend with his disapproving best friend Banky, her sexuality, and his own misgivings about himself in this Kevin Smith classic.

programme.title: Force 10 From Navarone, (1978, Action)
programme.desc: A group of allied commandos on a mission against the 3rd Reich has orders to blow a giant dam in order to crush a strategic bridge held by the Nazis.

programme.title: Catch-22, (1970, Comedy)
programme.desc: The tale of a small group of flyers in the Mediterranean in 1944. Separately and together, they are nervous, frightened, often profane and sometimes pathetic. Almost all are a little crazy. Catch-22 is an anti-war satire of epic proportions.

programme.title: Love And Bullets, (1979, Action)
programme.desc: The FBI sends a loner (Charles Bronson) to kidnap a mobster's mistress in Switzerland.

programme.title: The Mechanic, (1972, Action)
programme.desc: In a role that powered him to stardom, Charles Bronson is an underworld executioner who turns murder into an art form in this ultimate crime chiller.

programme.title: Apocalypse Now: Redux, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: This is the definitive version of Francis Ford Coppola's stunning vision of the heart of darkness in all of us, re-edited and re- mastered with 49 minutes of additional footage.

programme.title: Saturday Night Fever, (1976, Music)
programme.desc: John Travolta performs as the troubled Tony Manero - Brooklyn paint store clerk by day and undisputed king of the dance floor by night. A powerful and provocative urban tragedy that carries as much significance today as it did in 1977.

programme.title: Foxy Brown, (1974, Action)
programme.desc: A blaxploitation film about a woman whose drug-dealing brother ratted on her undercover narcotics-agent boyfriend to the mob and she, in turn, poses as a call girl to infiltrate the mobsters who butchered him.

programme.title: Midnight Cowboy, (1969, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: This Academy Award-winning Best Picture stars Dustin Hoffman and Jon Voight in standout, Oscar-nominated performances as a con man and a Texas hustler trying to survive on the tough streets of New York. The legendary John Schlesinger directs.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Mr. Mystery
programme.desc: Still steaming from his loss to Yuya, Sylvio looks to get some payback! But when Zuzu steps in to stop his plans, a mysterious stranger comes out of the shadows to show her how it’s done!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Bad Business
programme.desc: The Leo Institute is looking to take over Yuya’s duel school, and they’re bringing 3 of their most dangerous duelists to take down whoever dares stand in their way!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Dueling with the Stars
programme.desc: The battle to save Yuya’s duel school goes galactic when Yuya faces off against Leo Institute’s Dipper, an out-of-this-world duelist whose interstellar skills could have Yuya seeing stars!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: You Show 'Em
programme.desc: It’s a gem of a duel when Zuzu faces a fierce Fusion Summoner whose jewel monsters are a cut above the rest! Can Zuzu and her Divas belt out a victory, or will the Leo Institute’s diamond of a duelist force a final face-off?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Going, Going, Gong
programme.desc: It’s all up to Gong to save You Show from falling into the hands of the Leo Institute! Can Gong stare down defeat without moving his feet, or will a sword-swinging Syncro Summoner slice and dice his way to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battle Under the Big Top
programme.desc: It’s a battle under the big top, but no one’s clowning around! Yuya duels Declan to determine the fate of Yuya’s duel school!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Circus Surprise!
programme.desc: Declan has a surprise in store that could swing the duel his way! Can Yuya take down the best the Leo Institute has to offer, or will Declan’s deck prove to be unbeatable?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Yuya’s down in the dumps, but Principal Boyle’s not having it! Looking to snap Yuya out of his funk, Skip challenges Yuya to a duel to prove that the show must go on!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: In It To Win It
programme.desc: Still stinging from her defeat against the Leo Institute, Zuzu turns to an unlikely source for some assistance – Sora! But before her training can commence, a familiar looking stranger shows up, putting her lesson on hold!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Menu Venue: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuya is served a heaping helping of culinary catastrophe when he duels a celebrity chef with a menu full of merciless food monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Menu Venue: Part 2
programme.desc: The table is set for a frenzied food fight to the finish! Can Yuya handle what Chef Pepper dishes out, or will he lose a lot more than his appetite?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Trapped in a Card
programme.desc: It’s a case of mistaken identity when Yuya is eyed as the primary suspect for attacking Leo students! But when Yuya crosses paths with the real culprit, things go from bad to worse!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Quiz Quagmire: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuya matches minds with the quiz whiz extraordinaire Pierre L’Supérieure in a duel of wits! Can Yuya outsmart the smartest boy on Earth, or will Yuya end up scratching his head in defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Quiz Quagmire: Part 2
programme.desc: In the finale of the mind-bending match that’s part-duel, part-quiz show - one wrong answer could mean curtains for Yuya! Can he outduel and outthink a trivia whiz who’s never wrong?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Beyond Belief
programme.desc: Duelists throughout the city are continuously being attacked, and everyone is on the search to find out the who, how and why!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Date With Fate: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuya’s future takes a terrifying turn for the worse when he battles a fortunetelling foe who predicts this will be his last duel ever! Can Yuya fix his fate and avoid a devastating disaster, or has his luck finally run out?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Date With Fate: Part 2
programme.desc: As Yuya’s battle against the fortunetelling predictress Aura flares to its finish, it becomes crystal clear that Yuya’s danger-filled future is becoming a reality!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: For Our Tomorrows
programme.desc: Mysteries are revealed when the masked duelist who’s been terrorizing Leo Institute students is confronted and challenged to a battle royal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battle Between Buddies: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuya needs one more win to get into the Championship, but it will be his most difficult battle yet when he discovers he has to beat his best bud Gong in order to move on!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Battle Between Buddies: Part 2
programme.desc: The battle between best buds Yuya and Gong for a spot in the Arc League Championships rages to a friend-zied finish!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Challengers Assemble
programme.desc: Let the games begin! The top duelists from around the globe have gathered together for the Arc League Championships to find out who’s the best duelist in the world!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Something Fishy
programme.desc: Allie is looking to make a big splash at the Arc League Championship, but she soon finds herself in over her head! Can Allie’s deck of fishy friends turn the tides, or will her mysterious opponent sink her chances of winning?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Fusion Foes
programme.desc: Zuzu takes center stage in an epic rematch against Leo Institute’s dueling diamond, Julia Krystal! Will Zuzu avenge her earlier loss and walk away a winner, or will history repeat itself and leave Zuzu singing the blues?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Gong the Strong
programme.desc: When Gong’s old sparring partner sets a trap for Yuya, the only way Gong can save his friend is to forfeit his duel and get tossed from the tourney!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 1
programme.desc: Sylvio finally has just the thing to take Yuya down – a deck full of Pendulum Cards! Could Yuya's days in the spotlight be done for?
programme.sub-title: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuya is off his game and on the run as Sylvio zeroes in on zeroing out his life points! If Yuya can’t get into the swing of things, this could be his final performance!
programme.sub-title: The Pendulum Swings Both Ways: Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Making the Cut: Part 1
programme.desc: Sora is psyched to put on a showstopping duel for the fans, but his opponent Shay is set to turn Sora’s one man show into a no man show!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Making the Cut: Part 2
programme.desc: Sora and Shay's heated duel hits its boiling point when dark secrets about their hidden history come to light! Could there be something sinister behind Sora’s sweet-toothed smile?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Sora’s Secrets: Part 1
programme.desc: While Yuto is looking for answers, Sora is looking to get some revenge! But when these two tangle, Yuya finds out more than he ever expected!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Sora’s Secrets: Part 2
programme.desc: Surprises are in the cards as the battle between Sora and Yuto comes to an unexpected conclusion! But just when Yuya thinks he’s seen everything, a new face shows up on the scene that makes Yuya do a triple take!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Dark Reflection
programme.desc: Yuya can’t believe his eyes when he finds himself standing face-to-face-to-face with two lookalikes who are out to destroy each other… and everything in sight!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: Warped Dimensions
programme.desc: Yuya is in a coma, and nothing has been able to stir him from his terrifying state! Is Yuya down for the count, or will his duelmate’s ESP and TLC make him A-OK?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V: A Duel Personality
programme.desc: It’s time for the second round of the Arc League Championship! Yuya is pitted against his polar opposite – a duelist who doesn't duel to entertain, but rather put his foes into pain!

programme.title: Nami’s eagerness to explore the forbidden realm of Upper Yard brings her face to face with the wrath of god, and the Straw Hats incur Heaven’s Judgment for failing to pay their immigration fees!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The forbidden sacred ground! The island where god lives and heaven's judgement!

programme.title: The Straw Hats are no strangers to living on the wrong side of the law, but unpaid immigration fees and Nami’s assault of a White Beret earns Luffy’s crew a sentence of death by cloud drifting!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Already criminals?! Skypiea's upholder of the law!

programme.title: Nami, Zoro, Chopper, and Robin are trapped aboard the Going Merry when it’s commandeered by a monstrous lobster! To rescue his crew, Luffy must venture onto the sacred grounds of Upper Yard!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Is escape possible?! God's challenge is set in motion!

programme.title: Conis helps Luffy and his mates launch their rescue mission, but the rubber-man senses something amiss. When he presses her for answers, a vengeful god takes a shot at the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A trap on lovely street! The almighty eneru!

programme.title: Zoro dukes it out with a hungry Skyshark in the shadow of the Sacrificial Alter. On the other side of Upper Yard, Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp try to survive their visit to an island that wants them dead!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Onward, crow! To the sacrifical altar!

programme.title: Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp tangle with Satori and his exploding, snake-filled Surprise Clouds. The sky priest may look like a dancing dango, but the impact of his mantra leaves the pirates bloodied and boatless.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: 10% survival rate! Satori, the mantra master!

programme.title: Usopp and Sanji try to regain control of the Crow, and Luffy stirs up a brutal barrage of bursting balls when he attacks Satori. Meanwhile, Chopper whistles for the Sky Knight to avoid becoming a sacrificial reindeer!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The ordeal of spheres! Desperate struggle in the lost forest!

programme.title: Chopper fights bravely to stop Shura from incinerating the Going Merry, but the little reindeer is no match for a sky priest. Gan Fall is on his way, but will the dispossessed deity arrive in time?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Chopper in danger! Former god vs. Priest shura!

programme.title: When Gan Fall is badly burned during his battle with Shura, Chopper musters the courage for a death-defying leap of faith. Elsewhere, Luffy may have finally discovered a way to defeat Satori!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Profound mystery! Ordeal of string and ordeal of love?!

programme.title: The Shandorians prepare for an all-out attack on their priestly adversaries, Chopper meets the mysterious creatures that saved his life, and Nami makes an astonishing discovery about the origins of Upper Yard.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Light the fire of shandora! Wyper, the warrior!

programme.title: While the Shandorians continue their battle for control of Upper Yard, the Straw Hats celebrate their happy reunion by swapping stories over a campfire and feasting on barbequed Skyshark!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Jaya, city of gold in the sky! Head for god's shrine!

programme.title: Laki’s pursuit of precious Vearth causes one of her Shandorian comrades to be injured during the battle with Ohm. As night falls on Upper Yard, the Straw Hats dream of gold while dancing with wolves!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Festival on the night before gold-hunting! Feelings for vearth!

programme.title: The electrifying deity of Skypiea, God Eneru, grants his priests unlimited power in their hunt for the Straw Hats. Usopp has a plan to get the mysteriously-repaired Going Merry back in the water, but it involves using Chopper as bait!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Enter god eneru!! Farewell to the survivors!

programme.title: The Straw Hats scatter when their search for gold uncovers a giant python, and Gan Fall reveals the tragic story of Jaya’s arrival in the sky. Meanwhile, Wyper readies the Shandorians for a raid on Eneru’s shrine!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A giant snake bares its fangs! The survival game begins!

programme.title: As the heartless god of Upper Yard eagerly anticipates the dawning of Sky Warefare, the Shandorian forces are savagely snared by the Ordeal of String, and Luffy wanders into the fight of his life!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The deadly reject! War demon wyper's resolve!

programme.title: Zoro rushes to perfect a deadly technique known as the Flying Blade Attack. The move proves difficult to master, but it could be the key to the swordsman surviving a battle with the Shandorian warrior, Braham.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fierce midair battle! Pirate zoro vs. Warrior braham!

programme.title: Sanji and Usopp are driven to their knees by the electrifying presence of god, Luffy is nearly incinerated by Wyper’s Burn Bazooka, and Nami joins Gan Fall in a fight against two killer clones!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The roaring burn bazooka! Luffy vs. War demon wyper!

programme.title: Chopper unleashes the fury of his Rumble Ball during a sticky slugfest with a swap cloud spewing priest of Upper Yard. Can the little reindeer discover his opponent’s lone weakness before it’s too late?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The ordeal of the swamp! Chopper vs. Sky punk gedatsu!

programme.title: Nami and the Knight of the Sky team up to obliterate two bumbling, balloon-shaped bad guys, and God Eneru relies on his astounding invincibility to torment a noble Shandorian warrior.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Unbeatable powers! Eneru's true form is revealed!

programme.title: Robin’s search for a mystical city of gold is interrupted by Yama, one of Eneru’s faithful servants. When the rampaging warrior destroys some ancient ruins, he provokes the wrath of Robin’s many fists of fury!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A mystical city! The grand ruins of shandora!

programme.title: Priest Ohm silences Chopper with an attack from which few – if any – ever recover. Meanwhile, Luffy begins to notice something strange about his cave-like prison, and four fearsome warriors prepare for battle!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: 0% survival rate! Chopper vs. Ohm, the sword wielding priest!

programme.title: Zoro, Gan Fall, Wyper, Ohm, and a prizefighting pooch gather for a ferocious free-for-all at the site of the Upper Ruins. While the battle rages, Luffy tries to punch his way out of the belly of a poisonous python!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Climb giant jack! Deadly combat in the upper ruins!

programme.title: Zoro and Wyper are out to beat down the same bad guys, but will they realize it soon enough to survive a white-barbed death match of doom? Deep in the belly of the python, Nami and Luffy enjoy what could be a short-lived reunion!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The ordeal of iron! White barbed death match!

programme.title: Eager to end their battle, Zoro aims the awesome destructive power of his 108 Caliber Phoenix at the sinister Priest Ohm! Elsewhere, god demands that Robin help him search for a legendary golden bell.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: God Eneru begins a deadly rampage aimed at exterminating the heavenly beings of Skypiea, and the ruins of Shandora become the scene of a bloody contest where survival is the name of the game.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Collapsing upper ruins! The quintet for the finale!

programme.title: Gan Fall, Wyper, Zoro, and Robin join forces for an attack on God Eneru. Despite their furious onslaught, the four warriors prove powerless to harm the thunderous deity until Wyper utilizes the power of a mystical stone!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Showdown in the ancient ruins! Sky god eneru's goal!

programme.title: God Eneru makes a shocking recovery from wounds that should have ended his reign of terror. Zoro and Wyper muster the strength for one final stand, and Nami must choose between her friends – and survival.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Ambition toward the endless vearth! The ark maxim!

programme.title: Luffy emerges from his serpentine tomb with one thing on his mind: revenge! As the rubber-man sets out to settle the score with God Eneru, Conis rushes to warn her people of their impending doom!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: They finally clash! Pirate luffy vs. God eneru!

programme.title: As the citizens of the sky run for their lives, Eneru issues in the dawn of Deathpiea! Luffy is determined to stop the madman, but first he must discover a way to lay hands on the heinous holy man!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: A handful of gold sends Luffy hurtling towards his death, Sanji and Usopp mount a midair rescue mission, and Nami prepares for an electrifying showdown with God Eneru!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy falls! Eneru's judgement and nami's wish!

programme.title: Usopp arrives just in time to save Nami from a lethal thunderbolt, but even their combined powers are no match for Eneru. While they scramble for an escape route, Sanji stealthily searches for a way to sabotage god’s ark!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The two awaken! On the front lines of the burning love rescue!

programme.title: Despite being slowed by an arm encased in gold, Luffy races up a giant beanstalk on a mission to settle the score with Eneru! Elsewhere, the people of Skypiea feel the jolt of god’s wrath!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Capriccio for despair! The impending doom of sky island!

programme.title: A flashback offers a glimpse at the lives of two legendary figures in Skypiea’s history: Montblanc Noland and the ferocious warrior Kalgara!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Led by a bell's sound! Tale of the great warrior and the explorer!

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell, (1995, Anime)
programme.desc: 2029 – A female government cyber agent and the Internal Bureau of Investigations are hot on the trail of a "The Puppet Master" – a computer virus capable of invading cybernetic brains and altering its victim’s memory.

programme.title: Infinite, (2021, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Evan McCauley has skills he never learned and memories of places he has never visited. Self-medicated and on the brink of a mental breakdown, a secret group that call themselves Infinites come to his rescue, revealing that his memories are real.

programme.title: Total Recall, (1990, Science fiction)
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: Aeon Flux, (2005, Thriller)
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Charlize Theron stars as Aeon Flux, the underground operative fighting totalitarian rule in 25th-century Earth's last living city.

programme.title: Infinite, (2021, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Evan McCauley has skills he never learned and memories of places he has never visited. Self-medicated and on the brink of a mental breakdown, a secret group that call themselves Infinites come to his rescue, revealing that his memories are real.

programme.title: Total Recall, (1990, Science fiction)
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: Starship Troopers, (1997, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Courageous soldiers travel to the distant and desolate Klendathu system for the ultimate showdown between the species.

programme.title: Robocop, (1987, Action)
programme.desc: Detroit in the near future. A cop who dies in the line of duty is transformed into a crime-fighting cyborg by the corporation which now runs the police department. The only hitch: this "perfect" cop still seeks revenge on the creeps who mutilated him.

programme.title: Robocop 2, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: This first sequel pits Robocop against a gang of drug dealers and the title creature--a supposedly improved version of himself that has gone berserk.

programme.title: Silver Canyon, (1951, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Pat Buttram are sent by the cavalry to bring in raiders who are interfering with supply lines. Gene traces them to a small Army outpost where the outlaws set out to ravage the town.

programme.title: Cattle Annie And Little Britches, (1981, Western)
programme.desc: Two young aspiring outlaws (Amanda Plummer and Diane Lane) manage to join what’s left of the Doolin-Dalton gang, led by the aging Bill Doolin (Burt Lancaster). The gang’s heyday may be far behind them, but there’s still plenty of adventure left!

programme.title: Oklahoma Territory, (1960, Western)
programme.desc: A district attorney prosecutes an Indian chief on a murder charge, gets a conviction, and then arranges his escape when it's discovered that the Indian chief is innocent.

programme.title: Cariboo Trail, (1950, Western)
programme.desc: Montanans Jim Redfern and Mike Evans head into Canada's British Columbia via the Cariboo Trail intent to raise cattle and dig for gold but find trouble instead.

programme.title: Man From Del Rio, (1956, Western)
programme.desc: When a Mexican gunslinger rids a town of several notorious gunfighters, he is named the sheriff, but must win over the rest of the residents who are yet to warm to his hard-hitting ways.

programme.title: Man of the West, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.

programme.title: Shane, (1953, Western)
programme.desc: A retired gunfighter, now a drifter determined to establish a peaceful life, comes to the aid of a homestead family threatened by a land barron and his hired gun.

programme.title: Little Big Man, (1970, Western)
programme.desc: From director Arthur Penn (BONNIE AND CLYDE), Dustin Hoffman, Chief Dan George, Faye Dunaway, Martin Balsam, Jeff Corey and Richard Mulligan star in a genre-defying tale of an alleged 121-year-old white survivor of Custer's Last Stand.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West, (1969, Western)
programme.desc: The epic story of a mysterious stranger with a harmonica who joins forces with a notorious desperado to protect a beautiful widow from a ruthless assassin working for the railroad.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass, (1975, Western)
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: Up in the Air, (2009, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: Ryan (George Clooney) flies all over for work, but after meeting a passenger he learns that life isn't about the journey, but the connections we make along the way.

programme.title: Freedom Writers, (2007, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Hilary Swank stars in this story about a teacher in a racially divided school who gives her students what they’ve always needed - a voice.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: From three-time Oscar-winning director Steven Spielberg, Catch Me If You Can follows Frank W. Abagnale, Jr. as he successfully passes himself off as a pilot, a lawyer, and a doctor - all before his 21st birthday!

programme.title: Up in the Air, (2009, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: Ryan (George Clooney) flies all over for work, but after meeting a passenger he learns that life isn't about the journey, but the connections we make along the way.

programme.title: Freedom Writers, (2007, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Hilary Swank stars in this story about a teacher in a racially divided school who gives her students what they’ve always needed - a voice.

programme.title: Layer Cake, (2004, Thriller)
programme.desc: Planning to retire and begin a new life, Mr. X (Daniel Craig, Lara Croft: Tomb Raider), a successful West End drug dealer, has been asked for one last favor: to negotiate the sale of one million hits of Ecstasy. Rated: R

programme.title: The Mexican, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: A man tries to transport an ancient gun called The Mexican, believed to carry a curse, back across the border, while his girlfriend pressures him to give up his criminal ways.

programme.title: The Brothers Bloom, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: The con is on when two swindlers (Adrien Brody, Mark Ruffalo) make an heiress (Rachel Weisz) the target of their next scheme.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rui is a talented tennis player but Naru has noticed a dark change in her. Worried about their classmate, Naru and Usagi go to investigate.
programme.sub-title: A New Enemy Appears: Nephrite's Evil Crest

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami brings Usagi and Rei to her favorite park. Rei decides to have a date with Mamoru at the park before it closes down.

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Imortais, (2011)

Fox, Anouk Aimée, Max von Sydow, Maria Grazia Cucinotta, Umberto Orsini, Stefania Rocca, Richard Dillane, Marta Zoffoli, Ivan Kay... Diretor: Roger Young

Mas um encontro com Sócrates, um homem que questiona tudo, faz sua visão de mundo mudar completamente. programme.title: Agente Mirim, (1970)

programme.title: Você Acredita?, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um pastor é questionado por um morador de rua sobre sua crença em Deus, e passa a usar essa pergunta com seus fiéis também. A partir daí, doze histórias diferentes se cruzam, cada uma com sua provação sobre até onde vai a fé em Deus. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Rei da Montanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Espen Ash Lad, filho de um pobre agricultor, embarca em uma missão perigosa com seus irmãos para salvar a princesa de um vilão conhecido como o Rei da Montanha. O objetivo é ganhar uma recompensa e salvar a fazenda da sua família da ruína. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Todos os Caminhos Levam a Roma, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Maggie embarca em uma viagem para Itália, com Summer, sua filha adolescente. Mas ao chegar lá, Summer foge roubando o carro da mãe. Maggie contará com a ajuda de um ex-namorado para encontrar a filha. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Um Amor à Altura, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um homem encontra o celular de Diane e entra em contato para devolvê-lo. Quando se encontram, ela tem uma surpresa: ele tem apenas 1,36 m. Os dois logo se apaixonam, mas ela não está pronta para lidar com o preconceito de namorar um homem tão baixo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Substituto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após a morte do pai, o filho do chefão de uma tríade chinesa pede ao seu melhor amigo que se passe por ele e vire o novo líder do grupo. Mas o velho deixou inimigos que agora querem matar o novo chefão e assumir o controle. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Crime e Desejo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Agente do FBI chega a uma pequena cidade para investigar série de roubos a banco. Ele logo se aproxima de uma jovem viciada para obter informações, mas acaba se envolvendo com ela e vive um caso perigoso. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Xeque-Mate, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um caso de identidade trocada coloca Slevin no meio de uma guerra entre dois rivais de Nova York: Rabino e Chefe, os senhores do crime. Sob o olhar atento de um detetive e do assassino Goodkat, Slevin precisa elaborar um plano para salvar a sua pele. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: RedBad - A Invasão dos Francos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. No início da Idade Média, o rei frísio Redbad luta contra os francos que querem conquistar o império frísio livre. Para isso, ele tenta ganhar a confiança dos vikings, e tenta impedir a influência cristã sobre o norte europeu. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Maldição do Espelho, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O fantasma da Rainha de Espadas quer saciar sua sede com o sangue dos alunos de um internato que fica em uma antiga mansão. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: No Limite do Perigo, (1970)

programme.desc: 1970. Donnie Darko não se dá bem com sua família, seus professores ou seus colegas de classe, mas acaba encontrando uma amiga em Gretchen. Seu outro amigo, porém, não é tão confiável assim: trata-se de Frank, um coelho gigante que só ele pode ver. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Instinto Materno, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após trauma, uma mãe solteira se muda com a filha para uma isolada fazenda no interior. Mas logo coisas sinistras voltam a acontecer e seus instintos maternos são colocados à prova novamente. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Pequeno Gângster, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Rik Boskamp é filho de um contador, e não aguenta mais sofrer bullying na escola. Ao assistir a um filme sobre a máfia, tem uma ideia que parece brilhante. Fingir que seu pai é um poderoso mafioso. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Filmelier TV, (2026)
programme.desc: 2026. no info available Gêneros: no info available

programme.title: Vou te Seguir na Escuridão, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Uma mulher deprimida com a morte dos pais se envolve com um homem encantador. Quando ele desaparece misteriosamente após entrar em um prédio mal assombrado, ela promete encontrá-lo mesmo que tenha que atravessar para o mundo do sobrenatural. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Frank Ashmore, Jessee Foudray, Leah Pipes, Melinda Cohen, Mischa Barton, Ronnie Clark, Ryan Eggold, Ward Edmondson Diretor: Mark Edwin Robinson

programme.title: Legado de Violência, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Quando seu filho envolvido com negócios perigosos e pessoas de mau caráter foge, um pai se vê em meio a uma crise pessoal e familiar. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Ben Cotton, Connor Price, Curtis Caravaggio, Dayle Mcleod, Lara Jean Chorostecki, Mark O'Brien, Trish Rainone, Will Patton. Diretor: Christian Sparkes

programme.title: Professor, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. James Lewis é professor de inglês em um colégio conceituado e quando ele presencia uma briga, começa a notar que um de seus alunos é alvo de constante provocação. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Alejandro Raya, Cedric Young, Curtis Edward Jackson, David Dastmalchian, Esme Perez, Helen Joo Lee, Kevin Pollak, Matthew Garry. Diretor: Adam Dick

programme.title: Rumo ao Fim do Mundo, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Em meio a uma catástrofe biológica que ameaça destruir a raça humana, as histórias de três casais se cruzam quando eles são forçados a tomar decisões difíceis que definirão seu futuro. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Frank Langella, Gena Rowlands, Rosario Dawson, Alexis Bledel, Josh Hartnett, Penn Badgley, Teresa Palmer. Diretor: Brian Horiuchi

programme.title: O Ataque dos Tubarões, (2022)
programme.desc: 2022. Grandes tubarões brancos atacam um barco de pesca que se encontra a quilômetros da costa, obrigando os membros da tripulação a lutarem por suas vidas. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Brad Worch Ii, Brandon Laabs, Francesca Shipsey, Jim Fitzpatrick, Jonathan Shores, Meghan Carrasquillo, Mike Rae Anderson, Paul Van Scott, Brad Worch II, Tara Phillips Diretor: Jadon Cal

programme.title: O Lado Oculto da Lua, (2022)
programme.desc: 2022. Após os humanos esgotarem todas as fontes de água na Terra, uma nave é enviada até Titã, a maior Lua de Saturno, com a missão de reabastecer o nosso planeta. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Erin Coker, Jack Pearson, Jenny Tran, Justin Tanks, Michael Paré, Natalie Storrs, Neli Sabour, Scott Williams, Karan Sagoo, Anthony Jensen Diretor: Noah Luke

programme.title: Refúgio do Silêncio, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Funcionários de uma empresa vão a um refúgio nas montanhas e descobrem o horror por trás do lugar. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Danilo Di Julio, Devon Ogden, Donny Boaz, Eli Bildner, John Kerry, Landon Ashworth, Melanie Avalon, Rebecca Summers, Trista Robinson. Diretor: Ace Jordan

programme.title: Jogo da Sobrevivência, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Baseado em uma história real. Reagan, uma estrela do atletismo, é sequestrada por uma dupla de sociopatas depois que seu carro quebra em uma estrada deserta para a liberdade. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Murray Gray, Rusty Joiner, James Gaudioso Diretor: Simeon Rice

programme.title: Experimentos Macabros, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. Um homem e uma mulher acordam após uma cirurgia em um sanatório abandonado, sem nenhuma lembrança de quem são ou de como chegaram lá. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Angus Macfadyen, Camille Stopps, Chantal Perron, Gerrick Winston, Lisa Moreau, Thomas Cocquerel, Zoe Marlett Diretor: Rob Grant

A vida de Kyoko e de seus amigos está prestes a ser tomada pelo poder dos olhos da Medusa. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.sub-title: O Terror da Medusa dos 100 Olhos
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E41

programme.title: 1988. O Imperador de Crisis dá um ultimato aos Quatro Comandantes. O Relógio Final do Imperador surge no Forte Crisis. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E42

programme.title: 1988. Após vencer Gatridon, resultando na morte de Gadorian, desta vez quem decide se opor a RX é Gatezon. Em meio a isso, Dasmader analisa friamente os movimentos de RX, parecendo ter encontrado uma nova maneira de dar fim ao King Stone de RX. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E43

programme.title: 1988. O Império Crisis declara guerra total a todos que se oporem a eles. Bosgan é encarregado de destruir RX e tem a ajuda do "Guerreiro da Destruição", fornecido pelo Imperador Crisis: o Super Guerreiro Kaima Grandailas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.sub-title: Kamen Riders: Todos Juntos na Luta!
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E44

programme.title: 1988. RX desafia o Super Guerreiro Kaima Grandailas, arriscando sua vida nisso. No entanto, sua coragem desaparece junto das chamas da explosão dentro de Grandailas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E45

programme.title: 1988. General Jark toma as rédeas da situação e vai diretamente ao encontro de RX. Antes disso, o Imperador Crisis mostra sua ira perante Jark e, além de torturá-lo um pouco, decide aumentar seus poderes em quase 10 vezes... Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E46

programme.title: 1988. O Imperador Crisis coleciona mais uma derrota ao ver que o Coronel Jark (Jark Middler) é derrotado por RX. Dasmader solicita a Maribaron que convide RX até a base deles, que fica no Vale do Diabo, para uma reunião. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E47

programme.title: 1985. Zampa prepara uma armadilha definitiva para Jaspion. É revelada a relação entre Zampa e os pais de Jaspion e o motivo de suas mortes. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo

programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E20

programme.title: 1999. Cartman, Kyle e Stan enganam Tweek e Craig para que eles lutem um contra o outro. programme.desc: South Park - T03E04

programme.title: 1999. A mãe de Cartman dá um presente para ajudá-lo a ganhar o concurso de soletrar. Trata-se de um "macaco da fonética". Neste concurso, os rapazes conhecem Marc e Rebecca, dois irmãos que não vão para a escola, pois estudam em suas casas. programme.desc: South Park - T03E13

programme.title: 2000. Cartman acha que é muito maduro para sair com Stan, Kyle e Kenny, e decide buscar novos amigos na internet, mas termina se metendo em vários problemas com pedófilos. programme.title: 2001. Cartman encontra um carregamento cheio de fetos abortados após o tombamento de um caminhão em um barranco. programme.title: 2020. Depois de ver a reportagem, Anko percebe um intruso na prova, Orochimaru, mas não consegue detê-lo. Sakura, cansada e com medo, tenta impedir o inimigo. O autoproclamado demônio bonitão da Aldeia da Folha, Rock Lee, aparece para o resgate! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Promessa Do "Sobrancelhudo": Amor Eterno E Proteção
programme.desc: Naruto: A Promessa Do "Sobrancelhudo": Amor Eterno E Proteção - T01E31

programme.title: 2020. Protegendo Sakura, que não consegue mais se mover, Lee luta contra os três ninja do Som. Ele usa sua habilidade secreta, mas é ineficaz. Dosu o ataca, e Lee cai. Para proteger as pessoas que são importantes para ela, Sakura se levanta... Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Sakura Floresce - T01E32

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Sakura se defende dos ninjas do Som sozinha, o time rival Ino aparece! Depois de ver Sakura lutar contra os ninjas do Som, eles decidem ajudá-la. Com a formação de batalha "Ino-Shika-Cho", o time Ino tenta deter os atacantes… Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Formação De Batalha: Ino-Shika-Cho - T01E33

programme.title: 2020. Os ninjas do Som partem depois de enfrentar o poder de Sasuke. O time de Naruto tem um momento para se recuperar. Kiba consegue o segundo pergaminho e seu time vai em direção à torre. O parceiro canino de Kiba, Akamaru, nota algo adiante e para. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Akamaru Treme: A Força Cruel De Gaara
programme.desc: Naruto: Akamaru Treme: A Força Cruel De Gaara - T01E34

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e a equipe finalmente descansam. Já se passaram quatro dias desde o início da prova, restando apenas um para o fim. Naruto sugere duplicar o pergaminho do céu, que ainda precisam ter, e tenta abrir o pergaminho da terra, supostamente selado. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Segredo Do Pergaminho, Não É Permitido Olhar
programme.desc: Naruto: O Segredo Do Pergaminho, Não É Permitido Olhar - T01E35

programme.title: 2020. O time de Naruto se junta a Kabuto, mas eles são presos por um genjutsu (técnica ilusória). Eles caminham na mesma área várias vezes, perdem energia e lutam contra os vários clones criados pela técnica. Naruto os derrota, mas o número não diminui. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Clone Contra Clone: Os Meus São Melhores Que Os Seus
programme.desc: Naruto: Clone Contra Clone: Os Meus São Melhores Que Os Seus - T01E36

programme.title: 2020. Quando Naruto e seu time chegam à a torre e abrem os dois pergaminhos, Iruka aparece e explica o espírito do ninja chunin (nível médio) aos estudantes da Academia Ninja. Agora ele confia em Naruto e seu time. Anko fala com o Hokage sobre Orochimaru. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sobrevivendo Ao Corte: Os Nove Novatos Juntos Outra Vez
programme.desc: Naruto: Sobrevivendo Ao Corte: Os Nove Novatos Juntos Outra Vez - T01E37

programme.title: 2020. Os 21 ninjas que passaram na segunda parte da prova se juntam para o próximo desafio. Seus rostos demonstram várias emoções profundas. Mas como um número muito alto passou na segunda prova, as preliminares da terceira começarão imediatamente... Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Estreitando O Campo, Morte Súbita, Eliminação!
programme.desc: Naruto: Estreitando O Campo, Morte Súbita, Eliminação! - T01E38

programme.title: 2020. Na terceira prova os combates são um contra um. O primeiro é entre Sasuke e Yoroi, o capanga de Orochimaru. Yoroi encurrala Sasuke, que não consegue usar seu Sharingan por causa da Marca da Maldição no pescoço. Yoroi absorve o chakra para fora de Sasuke. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Ciúme Do Sobrancelhudo, A Rajada De Leões Se Solta!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Ciúme Do Sobrancelhudo, A Rajada De Leões Se Solta! - T01E39

programme.title: 2020. Kakashi desfaz o feitiço de Sasuke, e Orochimaru aparece. Ele quer o poder de Sharingan que o clã Uchiha possui. Nas preliminares da terceira prova, Zaku da Aldeia Escondida do Som luta contra Shino da Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Kakashi E Orochimaru Cara A Cara
programme.desc: Naruto: Kakashi E Orochimaru Cara A Cara - T01E40

programme.title: 2020. O próximo combate é entre o membro do time de Gaara, Kankuro, e o capanga de Orochimaru, Misumi. Misumi captura Kankuro, usando um corpo que consegue deslocar suas partes e juntas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Explosão Kunoichi: As Rivais Se Enfrentam
programme.desc: Naruto: Explosão Kunoichi: As Rivais Se Enfrentam - T01E41

programme.title: 2020. O quarto combate é entre Sakura e Ino, amigas de infância e ambas apaixonadas por Sasuke. Embora Sakura tenha admirado Ino desde pequena, ela não hesita em enfrentá-la, e as duas ninjas aparentam ter o mesmo nível e determinação. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Batalha Final: Cha! - T01E42

programme.title: 2020. O quinto combate é entre Tenten e Temari. Tenten, mestre em armas aéreas e várias outras, que são repelidas pelo leque de Temari. O sexto combate é entre Shikamaru e Kin. Kin parece estar em vantagem, mas Shikamaru usa seu Jutsu Possessão da Sombra. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Kunoichi Assassina E Um Trêmulo Shikamaru
programme.desc: Naruto: A Kunoichi Assassina E Um Trêmulo Shikamaru - T01E43

programme.title: 2020. No sétimo combate, Naruto enfrenta Kiba, que traz seu cachorro Akamaru. Kiba usa o Jutsu Quatro Patas para atacar Naruto, que consegue virar a mesa. Entretanto, Akamaru e Kiba consomem Pílulas de Comida e começam um ataque intenso contra Naruto. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Akamaru Se Revela, Quem É O Melhor Cachorro?
programme.desc: Naruto: Akamaru Se Revela, Quem É O Melhor Cachorro? - T01E44

programme.title: 2020. Depois de consumir Pílulas de Comida, os níveis de chakra de Kiba e Akamaru aumentam, e ambos começam a contra-atacar Naruto. Naruto usa Jutsu de Transformação contra Kiba e tenta ganhar com uma nova manobra secreta. O que será que Naruto planejou?! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Ataque Surpresa, A Arma Secreta do Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto: Ataque Surpresa, A Arma Secreta do Naruto - T01E45

programme.title: 2020. No oitavo combate, os primos Hinata e Neji do clã Hyuga se enfrentam. Embora a tímida Hinata não seja páreo para a agressividade de Neji, ela consegue ganhar força ao escutar as palavras de Naruto. Como será que esta batalha terminará? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha Byakugan: Hinata Ganha Coragem! - T01E46

programme.title: 2020. Hinata enfrenta Neji, mas ele ataca o ponto de pressão dela com Byakugan (olhos brancos). O fluxo de chakra de Hinata para, e ela quase perde a consciência. Ela encontra coragem ao lembrar como Naruto não desiste de nenhuma dificuldade. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Derrota Digna - T01E47

programme.title: 2020. No nono combate, Gaara finalmente aparece e seu oponente é Lee, um especialista em taijutsu (técnica física). Lee usa esta poderosa técnica contra Gaara, que manipula areia de sua cabaça. Então, a Armadura de Areia de Gaara finalmente se solta... Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Gaara Conta Rock Lee, O Poder Da Juventude Explode
programme.desc: Naruto: Gaara Conta Rock Lee, O Poder Da Juventude Explode - T01E48

programme.title: 2020. Lee usa a técnica banida, Lótus Primária, para atacar Gaara. A luta parece ter terminado, mas a manobra apenas danifica a proteção feita pela areia de Gaara. Imóvel após de ter usado Lótus Primária, Lee é lançado facilmente por toda parte por Gaara. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Força Oculta De Lee: Um Jutsu Secreto Proibido
programme.desc: Naruto: A Força Oculta De Lee: Um Jutsu Secreto Proibido - T01E49

programme.title: 2020. Lee decide usar a manobra proibida, Lótus Oculta, que libera três ou mais dos oito portais que possuem a concentração dos pontos de chakra. Quando os oito portais se abrem, o usuário pode morrer. Mas Gaara responde com seu próprio ataque, Ataúde de Areia. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Equipe Dez - T02E82

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T03E17

programme.desc: 2008. Sai diz que ele e Naruto se encontrarão de novo e desaparece. Homura e Koharu dizem a Tsunade que Naruto não deve ser enviado em missões envolvendo a Akatsuki. Tsunade não concorda, então eles exigem que ela adicione um ninja recomendado por Danzo. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Sinal De Fogo Preto - T02E64
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto fica enfurecido ao saber que Sai o atacou para testá-lo. Tsunade, Jiraiya, Yamatoe e Shizune se reunem no quarto de Kakashi. Jiraiya expõe o comportamento despreocupado de Naruto. Sai recebe um envelope misterioso do setor operacional da fundação. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Presa Na Escuridão - T02E65
programme.desc: 2008. A nova equipe Kakashi segue em direção à ponte Tenchi. Quando Sai mostra seu desprezo por Sasuke, o antagonismo com Naruto aumenta. Yamato decide que eles passarão a noite em uma pousada para tentar melhorar as relações entre os membros de sua equipe. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Almas Ressuscitadas - T02E66
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura vê Sai trabalhando em uma pintura abstrata e encontra um livro de desenhos incomum no meio das coisas dele. Enquanto vão em direção à ponte Tenchi, eles se mantêm atentos contra qualquer emboscada. Yamato orienta sua equipe caso uma luta aconteça. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden - T02E67
programme.desc: 2008. Yamato faz uma simulação para avaliar as habilidades e técnicas de luta da equipe Kakashi. Sai abandona Naruto para concluir a missão simulada. Naruto fica uma fera e declara que, se é para ajudar a salvar o Sasuke, ele ficará na mesma equipe que Sai. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Momento De Despertar - T02E68
programme.desc: 2008. O dia para capturar o espião finalmente chega. Yamato assume a aparência de Sasori e espera que o espião apareça. Para a surpresa de todos, o espião era Kabuto. De repente, Orochimaru aparece. A situação muda, e a equipe Kakashi se encontra em risco. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Desespero - T02E69
programme.desc: 2008. Ao enfrentar Orochimaru, Naruto liberta o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Quando Yamato vê a quarta cauda, lembra do que Jiraiya falou. Yamato deveria suprimir o chakra que afetaria o corpo de Naruto. O ninjutsu secreto de Yamato se torna aparente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Ressonância - T02E70
programme.desc: 2008. Quando a terceira cauda aparece, Naruto só consegue ver Orochimaru. Ele está cego até para seus companheiros de equipe. Sakura é atingida e cai inconsciente. Sai finalmente segue para sua missão secreta. Naruto libera a quarta cauda proibida. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Meu Amigo - T02E71
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde a consciência e é tomado por impulsos destrutivos. Os clones de Sai e Yamato testemunham uma batalha horrível entre Orochimaru e Naruto. O poder e a aparência de Naruto se tornam demoníacos, como se ele estivesse se transformando na Raposa. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Uma Ameaça Se Aproxima - T02E72
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto, mesmo transformado, não desiste de trazer Sasuke para casa. Sakura é ferida por Naruto, mas consegue usar seu ninjutsu para conter a agitação da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Orochimaru tenta deixar o campo de batalha, mas é confrontado por Sai. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Invasão Da Akatsuki - T02E73
programme.desc: 2008. Orochimaru aceita levar Sai para o esconderijo. Yamato consegue parar a agitação de Naruto, mas os ferimentos de Naruto são graves. Quando ele volta a si, Yamato revela a ele e Sakura que Sai foi embora e que Danzo pode estar conspirando algo terrível. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Sob O Céu Estrelado - T02E74
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto e sakura ficam chocados quando descobrem que Danzo planeja trabalhar com Orochimaru. A equipe Dakashi é forçada a fazer uma pausa. Orochimaru percebe que está sendo seguido pelo clone de Yamato e decide usar Sai para despistar seus perseguidores. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Oração Do Velho Monge - T02E75
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto fica chocado ao saber que foi o responsável pelos ferimentos de Sakura. Yamato diz que ele irá suprimir o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas com seu ninjutsu. Sakura pergunta sobre uma história estranha que ela viu no livro de desenhos de Sai. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Próximo Passo - T02E76

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Escalada De Prata - T02E77

Sakura descobre, através das atitudes de Sai, alguns pontos fortes em seu subconsciente e assinala para Sai as contradições em seu comportamento. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Julgamento - T02E78
programme.desc: 2008. Kabuto faz um ataque de surpresa na equipe Kakashi para levar Sai de volta. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Un Grito Interrompido - T02E79

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Últimas Palavras - T02E80

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The United Front
programme.desc: Bernie and Wanda strive to present a united front when disciplining the children; Wanda becomes unhappy with this strategy because shes accustomed to playing the good cop.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Sweet Life
programme.desc: Bernie circumvents his low-cholesterol diet by sneaking over to a neighbors (guest star Don Rickles) place.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Sin Cup
programme.desc: Bernie and Wanda worry about Jordans religious faith after he defaces a picture of Jesus.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Bernie Mac Rope-A-Dope
programme.desc: Bernie offends Wandas boss (Wesley Snipes) at a dinner party.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Magic Jordan
programme.desc: Jordan learns some magic tricks and uses them to charm his first crush.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Raging Election
programme.desc: Bernie calls on India.Arie to help out with Vanessas talent show.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Alabama State University
programme.desc: Alabama State University.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Bethune-Cookman University
programme.desc: Featuring Bethune-Cookman University.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn whats behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQs Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Childhood Interrupted
programme.desc: Coming of age is not easy.

programme.title: Style Kings - Styling For Queens
programme.desc: Dedrick and Dr. Lesia Crumpton Young embark on the Greatness Collection to shatter glass ceilings and shine a light on female greatness; Justin recalls the sourcing visits he went on to select lighting and wallpaper for business woman Corrinas home.

programme.title: Style Kings - Technology
programme.desc: Justin navigates the most expensive bathroom redesign hes encountered with clients Darius and Christopher; advanced technology requires a lot of pre-planning to get everything functioning just right; Dedrick brings style to a new industry.

programme.title: Style Kings - Planning: Phases; Sections
programme.desc: Justin tackles a complex bathroom redesign for clients with many requests; Dedrick strategizes with his team on expanding Hideokis reach through product launches and roadshows.

programme.title: Style Kings - Art And Creative Design
programme.desc: Dedrick has a visit from his previous Artistic Director, Crystal Paris, a renowned artist who has a surprise gift for him; Justin finesses the finishing touches on Lamars condo in the city with art from his personal collection.

programme.title: The Dempsey Sisters
programme.desc: Three siblings (Cymphonique Miller, Denyce Lawton, Teairra Mari) return to their musical roots, agreeing to let their brother manage their family band.

programme.title: Playing Sam
programme.desc: After her ex-boyfriends acting career takes off, Samantha picks up the pieces of her broken heart and (so-called) acting career to rediscover her essence as a modern Latinx actress.

programme.title: Family Time - Merry Kwanzaa
programme.desc: When Lisas attempts to spread the holiday cheer fall short, Tony steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Family Time - Sick Of This
programme.desc: The Stallworths realize they are each a lot to handle when feeling under the weather.

programme.title: Family Time - Rich Donnie
programme.desc: Lisa helps Ebony with the SATs while Tony deals with Donnies inheritance.

programme.title: Family Time - Social Media Dad
programme.desc: Tony uses social media to shame the kids while Lisa finds herself in a sister tug-of-war.

programme.title: Family Time - Reunited And It Feels So Good
programme.desc: Lisa sets Cheryl up at Tony and Lisas high school reunion while Donnie crashes the party.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Sorely Missed
programme.desc: When Bernie and Wanda find themselves spending all of their time with the kids, Bernie decides they need some time alone.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Fumes of Detente
programme.desc: Wanda invites Tasha, Vanessas best friend from Chicago, to stay with them; Bernie is worried he will have another difficult teen in his house.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Exercise in Fertility
programme.desc: After several failed attempts, Bernie and Wanda realize that making a baby is harder than they thought, and Wanda begins to question their fertility.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - An Exercise in Fertility
programme.desc: Bernie and Wanda focus on having a baby, neglecting the children they already have.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Fantasy Football
programme.desc: Bernie and Jordan join a fantasy football league together, but differing philosophies on player picks soon come between them as Jordan eventually leaves Bernie to get a higher ranking.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Love With Interest
programme.desc: When a smooth talker tries to take advantage of Regina, Steve tries to protect her; Cedric hides a rival schools mascot.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Guess Whos Not Coming to Dinner?
programme.desc: Regina pretends to have a husband to impress an old schoolmate; Steve and his students are stranded in an airport.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Roof Is on Fire
programme.desc: Regina rooms with Steve when a roof fire leaves her homeless; romance heats up between Romeo and Sara.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - I Do, I Dont
programme.desc: Steve refuses to allow Snoop Doggy Dogg and Sean Puffy Combs to use music from the Hi-Tops until they resolve their rivalry.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Hair Jordan
programme.desc: Bernie takes Jordan to his favorite barbershop, but the owner throws them out; Wanda and the girls try to change the batteries in a smoke detector.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Love Bug

programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Boudica: Queen of War (2023)
programme.desc: Roman conquerors slay King Prasutagus, take away his children, and force his wife, Boudica, into subservience. Consumed by grief and a burning desire for justice, Boudica vows to reclaim her homeland from the clutches of the Romans.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: Miles to Go Before I Sleep
programme.desc: The relationships between musicians and their road crews and the importance of the people who work to put shows together.

programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renee Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.
